response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified song metadata (holoX). 2. Used search to identify song: '暁闇エクスデス' (Gyoun Exdesu) by PandaBoy. 3. Extracted lyrics and identified the structure. 4. Translated the lyrics. 5. Mapped scenes based on musical performance.
response.global_summary: A concert performance by the holoX VTuber unit, featuring a full vocal performance of their song '暁闇エクスデス' (Gyoun Exdesu).

scenes.description: Instrumental intro and introductions of the holoX members.
The vocal performance of the song '暁闇エクスデス' (Gyoun Exdesu) begins. Performers: La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, Kazama Iroha, and Sakamata Chloe.
